beats.caption: AC-1 - state, countdown & 6 live signals
beats.expectedScreen: the Power page at IDLE with a countdown clock and the six busy-signal rows (sessions, cards, presence, SSH, load, Keep Awake) highlighted

beats.caption: AC-2 - working session blocks; box BUSY
beats.expectedScreen: the Power page showing the BUSY badge, a 'Box is busy' hero, and the Working sessions row reading 1 working highlighted

beats.caption: AC-4 - Suspend Now asks to confirm first
beats.expectedScreen: the Suspend Now button changed to a red 'Tap again to confirm' state, highlighted

segments.caption: AC-4 - 10s warning + honest-fail suspend in code
segments.expectedScreen: server.mjs runSuspend source with the suspend-warning broadcast line highlighted and a note about the 10-second warning

highlight.note: clients get a 10-second warning (SUSPEND_WARNING_MS = 10000) before the suspend POST; never fired on camera for box safety

beats.caption: AC-5 - awake hours: today & last 7 days
beats.expectedScreen: the Awake hours panel showing a 'today' hours value and a 'last 7 days' hours value, highlighted

beats.caption: AC-6 - mobile-first: usable on a phone
beats.expectedScreen: the Power page rendered full-width on a narrow 390px phone viewport with the countdown and large Suspend Now / Keep Awake touch targets

beats.caption: AC-3 - Keep Awake pinned for 1 hour
beats.expectedScreen: the Keep Awake panel showing an active 'until <time>' pin with a Cancel button, highlighted
